Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 50 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Good Bad ISPs 23 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. "Our programs are fun to use" – Beagle Bros 14 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. CT Scans of Health Wearables 74 upvotes, 12 comments
  5. Image manipulation with convolution using Julia 35 upvotes, 4 comments
  6. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 570 upvotes, 179 comments
  7. Payphone Go 142 upvotes, 38 comments
  8. Xous security focused open source on 22nm custom silicon 39 upvotes, 7 comments
  9. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 241 upvotes, 77 comments
  10. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  11. Show HN: Swarm – Program a colony of 200 ants using a custom assembly language 151 upvotes, 48 comments
  12. Open Camera is a FOSS Camera App for Android 44 upvotes, 12 comments
  13. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 172 upvotes, 68 comments
  14. 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips 827 upvotes, 422 comments
  15. Good software knows when to stop 516 upvotes, 259 comments
  16. "I'm obviously taking a risk here by advertising emoji directly." 87 upvotes, 35 comments
  17. GPL upgrades via section 14 proxy delegation 90 upvotes, 38 comments
  18. Entomologists Use a Particle Accelerator to Image Ants at Scale 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Workers who love 'synergizing paradigms' might be bad at their jobs 327 upvotes, 181 comments
  20. System76 on Age Verification Laws 692 upvotes, 485 comments
  21. GPT-5.4 948 upvotes, 742 comments
  22. The Brand Age 420 upvotes, 337 comments
  23. CBP says it can't comply with refund order 44 upvotes, 26 comments
  24. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 76 upvotes, 52 comments
  25. Global warming has accelerated significantly 585 upvotes, 515 comments
  26. Supertoast Tables 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Aldus PageMaker Founder Paul Brainerd Has Died 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. US economy unexpectedly sheds 92,000 jobs in February 383 upvotes, 454 comments
  29. Show HN: Interactive 3D globe of EU shipping emissions 10 upvotes, 5 comments
  30. Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 1:30am, 7 March 2026. Source here.
